overall.description: A static atmospheric shot from a fantasy game engine showcasing a foggy waterfront at night. Warm lantern lights illuminate a forest path in the foreground while a massive gothic castle with glowing windows looms in the misty background across the water.

segments.scene_description: A completely static cinematic view of a foggy waterfront at night. The foreground features a warm lantern illuminating a dirt path and wooden dock edge, while string lights recede into the dense forest. Across the calm water, a massive gothic castle with glowing windows emerges from the blue mist, creating a striking contrast between the warm artificial lights and cool moonlit atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a foggy waterfront at night where warm foreground lights contrast with a cold, gothic backdrop. It begins with a focus on a warm lantern illuminating a dirt path and the edge of a wooden dock, while delicate string lights recede into the shadows of a dense forest. As the eye moves beyond the shoreline, the scene opens across the calm, dark water toward a massive gothic castle. The structure gradually emerges from a thick blue mist, its glowing windows piercing through the haze to complete the transition from the intimate warmth of the path to the imposing scale of the moonlit fortress.
